PROBATION UPDATED PER AB 1950

/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 39D /CTS  3 /SWAPD 05-11-18/CTORD  9 DAYSERVED THROUGH SWAP BE BE APPLIED TOWARDS FINES AND FEES PURSUANT TO PC2900,5/PF145 12/VF2:150/FOP1:9  MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION//RESTRPT:06-11-18/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:BY COUNSEL/
